# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

TEMP_FILE="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
TEMP_RESULT="/tmp/myapp-$$-result.tmp"
TEMP_SORTED="/tmp/myapp-$$-sorted.tmp"

echo "Starting data processing pipeline..."

echo "apple,5,red" > "$TEMP_FILE"
echo "banana,3,yellow" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
echo "cherry,8,red" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
echo "date,12,brown" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
echo "elderberry,2,purple" >> "$TEMP_FILE"

echo "Processing data from $TEMP_FILE..."

while IFS=',' read -r fruit quantity color; do
    new_quantity=$((quantity * 2))
    echo "$fruit,$new_quantity,$color" >> "$TEMP_RESULT"
done < "$TEMP_FILE"

echo "Sorting results..."
sort -t',' -k2 -n "$TEMP_RESULT" > "$TEMP_SORTED"

echo "Reading processed results from $TEMP_SORTED:"
cat "$TEMP_SORTED"

echo "Calculating total quantity..."
total=0
while IFS=',' read -r fruit quantity color; do
    total=$((total + quantity))
done < "$TEMP_SORTED"

echo "Total quantity: $total" | tee -a "$TEMP_FILE"

echo "Filtering red items..."
grep ",red$" "$TEMP_SORTED" > "$TEMP_RESULT"

echo "Red items:"
cat "$TEMP_RESULT"

echo "Appending summary to original temp file..."
echo "---SUMMARY---" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
cat "$TEMP_RESULT" >> "$TEMP_FILE"

echo "Final temp file contents:"
cat "$TEMP_FILE"

echo "Archiving results..."
cat "$TEMP_FILE" "$TEMP_RESULT" "$TEMP_SORTED" > "/tmp/myapp-$$-final.tmp"

echo "Processing complete. Temp files created:"
ls -lh /tmp/myapp-$$*.tmp
